title: CXXRTL: incorrect result of shl operator

features.name: shift_left_result_assignment_to_smaller_unpacked_array
features.description: Code should include an assignment where a shift-left expression result exceeds the target unpacked array width, requiring truncation

features.name: arithmetic_shift_left_operator
features.description: Code should include an arithmetic shift-left operator with multi-bit operands where the result exceeds wire width
